name: Black Essential Crop Tee
description_html:
The Essentials Collection is designed for those who value style, comfort, and performance. Built on timeless neutral tones, these pieces move seamlessly from gym to street, offering effortless versatility. Each garment blends comfort, durability, and minimal design to create the perfect foundation for any active wardrobe.

Minimalist and versatile, the Essential Black Crop Top is designed to move effortlessly with you. Its streamlined cropped cut and timeless neutral tone make it the ultimate layering piece — sleek enough for the gym, stylish enough for everyday wear. Crafted from soft, breathable fabric with a body-skimming fit, it’s perfect on its own with high-rise leggings or paired under a jacket or hoodie. From workouts to weekends, this top delivers comfort, confidence, and endless styling potential.

  • Cropped cut for a flattering, modern fit
  • Timeless black neutral tone for versatile styling
  • Soft, breathable fabric for comfort and ease of movement
  • Minimalist design that layers seamlessly with any look
  • Perfect for training, lounging, or everyday wear

name: Black Essential Cross Back Sports Bra
description_html:
The Essentials Collection is designed for those who value style, comfort, and performance. Built on timeless neutral tones, these pieces move seamlessly from gym to street, offering effortless versatility. Each garment blends comfort, durability, and minimal design to create the perfect foundation for any active wardrobe.

The Essential Cross-Back Bra combines sleek design with dependable performance. Featuring a dynamic crisscross strap construction, it delivers both style and secure support for every move. Engineered for lasting comfort, this versatile piece adapts effortlessly to training, yoga, and everyday wear. The open-back silhouette enhances breathability while adding a bold, modern edge, making it a perfect choice for both workouts and casual layering. Crafted from soft, flexible fabric, this bra is designed to keep you confident, comfortable, and supported from studio to street.

  • Crisscross strap design for a secure, stylish fit
  • Medium support ideal for training, yoga, and everyday activities
  • Open-back silhouette for enhanced airflow and freedom of movement
  • Soft, stretchy fabric that moves with your body
  • Sleek design that layers effortlessly with leggings or athleisure

name: Black Essential Flair Leggings

The Essentials Collection is designed for those who value style, comfort, and performance. name: C-BURN EXTREME THERMOGENIC FAT BURNER
description_html:
C-BURN is a professional grade fat burner that utilizes 4 clinically studied, patented ingredients to rapidly burn calories, suppress appetite and metabolize stubborn fat. It’s our most powerful fat burner and delivers maximum results. With C-BURN, you will definitely feel the heat and the intensity, and you’ll know the product is working fast!

With a 5-phase approach, C-BURN is designed to torch fat from all angles by curbing appetite, reducing water retention, regulating healthy blood sugar levels & mobilizing brown fat for energy. If you’re looking to make a major body transformation, C-BURN should be in your arsenal of products. For best results, take daily for at least 30 days.

name: CANTEEN Hydration + Electrolytes
description_html:
Maintaining proper hydration goes beyond the simple act of consuming water. And, if you’re an athlete or active individual, there is a very important relationship between adequate hydration and performance. Hydration not only plays a vital role in regulating fluids, temperature and pH levels in the body, it’s also essential in supplying nutrients that fuel your energy, endurance, and recovery processes.

Meet CANTEEN – one of the most advanced hydration formulas available for maximizing performance. Don't just take our word for it – compare the supplement facts of CANTEEN with any leading hydration drink. This comprehensive formula is specially crafted to ensure optimal hydration and support your body's functioning during and after exercise, as well as throughout the day.

Here's how: Dehydration can occur when the body loses fluid through sweat, increased body temperature, heavy breathing, or daily activity. With intense training, dehydration can occur more rapidly or severely. When cells lack fluids, they are unable to perform at their best. Relying solely on water for rehydration may not be sufficient to replenish the body's fluids. That's where CANTEEN comes in – it contains essential electrolytes like Sodium, Potassium, and Magnesium that aid in restoring lost fluids and reestablishing optimal hydration levels. And then CANTEEN takes hydration even further.

CANTEEN also includes
  • Dextrose - an easily digestible sugar to support electrolyte absorption
  • Taurine to support exercise performance and energy production
  • Vitamin C and 100% DV B-Vitamins to support energy production and immune health
  • Coconut Fruit Water Powder which is ultra rich in electrolytes and antioxidants and has been called the ideal hydration fluid
  • Hyaluronic Acid to support hydration of the skin, muscles and joints


Believe us about CANTEEN yet? It’s ideal to drink CANTEEN during your workouts but to also add to your water throughout the day. Train hard, live healthy and don’t forget your CANTEEN.

name: COACH PRIME MRE LITE Red Velvet
description_html:
Crush your cravings with the bold, irresistible flavor of MRE LITE Red Velvet—a perfect blend of rich cocoa, smooth frosting, and the iconic taste of this classic dessert, all packed with premium protein to fuel your grind.
Every scoop is loaded with high-quality protein, giving you the indulgence of fresh-baked red velvet cake without the guilt. It’s the ultimate treat that combines incredible flavor with essential nutrition, designed to fuel your body, satisfy your cravings, and help you crush your fitness goals—because you shouldn’t have to compromise on taste or results.

Formulated without whey protein, MRE LITE has 24g protein per serving and a macronutrient profile ideal for post workout or any time of day when you need extra protein.And unlike whey alternatives, MRE LITE has a thicker, more milkshake-like texture that mixes easily and mixes perfectly.Plus, with no whey protein, the formula is incredibly gentle on your stomach, easy to digest, and does not result in bloating commonly associated with whey protein.

name: CREATINE MONOHYDRATE
description_html: Creatine is an amino acid, naturally found in muscle cells and a variety of foods, in particular – red meat. As a supplement, Creatine monohydrate is one of the most extensively studied dietary supplements of all time. It has been shown to provide a multitude of benefits including increased muscle strength, muscle mass, and endurance. Creatine monohydrate also plays a critical role in ATP production, the primary source of energy for muscle cells. REDCON1’S Creatine Monohydrate contains the clinically studied 5g per serving, enhancing total exercise performance and recovery, leading to faster gains in both muscle strength and size.

name: DOUBLE TAP CAPSULES
description_html:
Turn up the heat and take your fat-burning to the next level with DOUBLE TAP Capsules—a powerful thermogenic formula designed to help you shred fat, boost energy, and enhance focus.
Each serving is packed with scientifically backed ingredients to increase metabolism, suppress appetite, and maximize calorie burning, making it the perfect tool for those serious about cutting down and staying energized. Whether you're hitting the gym or tackling a long day, DOUBLE TAP keeps you dialed in and ready to perform—without the jitters or crash.

As an energizing fat burner, DOUBLE TAP can be taken in the morning on an empty stomach, during fasted cardio or as a preworkout before your training sessions. Additionally, you can stack DOUBLE TAP with our non-stimulant fat burner SILENCER, for an even more advanced and all-day fat burn.

name: Dr Jolt  | HIGH-PERFORMANCE ENERGY DRINK
description_html:
You know this flavor. Or at least … you think you do.

Meet Dr Jolt, a bold fusion of dark cherry, warm spice, and smooth vanilla, rebuilt as a high-performance energy drink.  It starts with a rich, deep cherry flavor upfront, layered with subtle spice, rounded out by a smooth, almost creamy finish. Familiar … but sharper.  More refined.  The kind of flavor that lingers just long enough to make you go back for another sip.

Then it kicks in.

Dr Jolt delivers a smooth, focused energy.  No sugar, no heaviness, just a steady lift that helps keep you sharp, dialed in, and moving.  It’s indulgence without compromise.

This isn’t a throwback. It’s an upgrade.

name: GI JUICE Digestive Enzymes
description_html:
GI JUICE is a digestive enzyme supplement that's powered by a nutrient-dense formula. GI JUICE is designed to enhance digestion, gut health, immunity and energy for everyday wellness. Formulated with both pre and probiotics and a highly concentrated dose of 13 fruits and vegetables, GI JUICE helps support digestion and a healthy immune system with a specially formulated digestive enzymes powder. 

Every scoop of GI JUICE is designed to help cleanse, detoxify and energize your body to help you feel great and energized all year round. And unlike your average greens drink, GI JUICE mixes great and tastes delicious! Mix with water, juice, protein, shakes or any beverage of choice to boost your overall health and immunity daily!

name: HALO
description_html:
When it comes to muscle building, REDCON1 has an elite arsenal of supplements designed to enhance muscle protein synthesis, strength and performance.

HALO is powered by Chinese Smilax, a plant sterol with natural anabolic properties to help the body build more muscle. It is shown to improve nitrogen retention, a critical factor in building muscle. A positive nitrogen balance is associated with muscle growth and repair, increased muscle protein synthesis and improved performance. HALO is beneficial for both men and women, it’s natural and non-hormonal.

name: HOSTESS MRE LITE Twinkies™ Protein Powder
description_html: MRE LITE in two classic Hostess™ flavors—Twinkies and CupCakes—each delivering 26 grams of whole food protein with indulgent, nostalgic taste. Enjoy our signature creamy, milkshake-like texture paired with the soft sponge cake and classic creamy filling of Twinkies, or experience the rich chocolate cake and smooth cream filling of CupCakes. Both flavors offer the same lactose-free, easy-to-digest protein you trust, now elevated with the comfort of beloved desserts into your daily routine. Protein, the tastiest way.

name: HOSTESS™ MRE LITE Cupcakes Protein Powder
description_html: Imagine the flavor of a classic Hostess™ Cupcakes—rich chocolate cake, lightly sweet, and topped with that signature creamy-filled center. It’s the nostalgic treat you grew up with, re-created as a smooth, crave-able protein experience. Every sip delivers that unmistakable chocolate-cake sweetness and creamy finish that makes a Cupcake instantly recognizable, without feeling heavy or overly rich. It’s comfort-food flavor meets everyday protein—familiar, fun, and irresistibly easy to drink

name: Ivory Essential Crop Tee
description_html:
The Essentials Collection is designed for those who value style, comfort, and performance. Built on timeless neutral tones, these pieces move seamlessly from gym to street, offering effortless versatility. Each garment blends comfort, durability, and minimal design to create the perfect foundation for any active wardrobe.

Fresh and refined, the Essential Ivory Crop Top delivers the same streamlined fit as its black counterpart in a softer neutral shade. Designed with a flattering cropped cut and crafted from breathable, flexible fabric, it offers effortless comfort while maintaining a sleek, minimalist look. Its clean ivory tone makes it a versatile piece that layers beautifully with leggings, joggers, or denim, adding a touch of understated elegance to any outfit. From training to everyday wear, this top is a true wardrobe staple.

  • Cropped cut for a flattering, modern silhouette
  • Soft ivory neutral tone for a clean, elevated look
  • Breathable, stretchy fabric that moves with you
  • Minimalist design that pairs effortlessly with any style
  • Perfect for workouts, layering, or casual everyday wear

description_html:
The Essentials Collection is designed for those who value style, comfort, and performance. Its breathable, stretchy fabric moves with your body, offering support that’s perfect for any occasion. Effortless, refined, and endlessly wearable, this bra is the perfect foundation for any modern wardrobe.

  • Clean, minimalist design for a timeless look
  • Soft, stretchy fabric that moves with your body
  • Neutral ivory tone for versatile styling
  • Comfortable fit designed for all-day wear

name: JOLT COLA Root Beer Energy Drink
description_html:
The legendary jolt of energy is back—refreshed, recharged, and ready to power your hustle.
Introducing the all-new Jolt Cola, redesigned for today’s active lifestyle. We’ve kept the iconic kick you love but upgraded it with better-for-you ingredients and zero sugar—so you get all the energy, without the crash.

Whether you’re grinding, chasing waves, pulling late nights, or gearing up for your next adventure, Jolt Cola is your clean, high-voltage fuel.

No sugar. No crash. Just pure, unrelenting energy.

description_html: REDCON1 is a mission-based company founded on a simple principle - create the highest quality supplements for people who trained, for people that need to be at their best.

name: MRE LITE WHOLE FOOD PROTEIN
description_html:
Fuel your body with the power of real food. MRE LITE is a high-quality, low-carb protein powder designed to give you the nutrition you need without the extra calories or carbs. 

MRE LITE offers 26g of high-quality protein per serving with an ideal macronutrient profile for post-workout recovery or anytime you need an extra protein boost. Unlike typical whey-based protein powders, MRE Lite delivers a rich, milkshake-like texture that mixes easily and tastes incredible.

name: MRE LITE Whole Food Protein - 20 Servings
description_html:
The MRE protein line is built off the premise that ‘real food protein is the most important fuel you can give your body.’ Compared to the original MRE, MRE LITE is a low carb meal replacement shake and is a delicious way to up your protein intake without the added calories or carbohydrates.

Formulated without whey protein, MRE LITE has 24g protein per serving and a macronutrient profile ideal for post workout or any time of day when you need extra protein. And unlike whey alternatives, MRE LITE has a thicker, more milkshake-like texture that mixes easily and mixes perfectly.Plus, with no whey protein, the formula is incredibly gentle on your stomach, easy to digest, and does not result in bloating commonly associated with whey protein.

name: MRE Lite Sample
description_html: MRE Lite Sample

name: MRE Meal Replacement (7 LB)
description_html:
MRE Meal Replacement is a whole food protein powder designed to provide calorie-dense nutrition with a balanced blend of protein and carbohydrates. With 46g of protein and 60g of carbohydrates per serving, it helps support daily nutrition, calorie intake goals, and active lifestyles.

Made with whole food protein sources including beef, chicken, salmon, and egg, along with complex carbohydrates from oats, MRE Meal Replacement is a protein powder designed to support higher-calorie nutrition needs. This calorie-dense formula can be used as a meal replacement when needed, post-workout, or any time of day to help support increased calorie and protein intake.

name: MRE Protein Bars
description_html:
This is not a typical protein bar. It is a completely reengineered, candy bar–like experience built for people who want real satisfaction without compromising their macros.

Each MRE Bar is crafted with dual layers of protein, wrapped in rich enrobing and finished with craveable inclusions for a soft, dessert-style bite. The texture is smooth, the flavor is indulgent, and the experience is closer to your favorite candy bar than anything you would expect from a protein bar.

We rebuilt MRE Bar from the inside out. The result is a premium, meal-ready protein bar that delivers indulgent taste first, then backs it up with better built macros that fit real life.

This is what happens when you raise the bar. Literally.

name: MRE Ready To Drink Protein Shakes
description_html:
The MRE protein line is built off the premise that ‘real food protein is the most important fuel you can give your body.’ MRE Protein Shake is a convenient ready-to-drink protein shake that is perfect for pre and post workout. 

Formulated without whey protein, MRE Protein Shake has 40g protein per serving and a macronutrient profile ideal for post workout or any time of day when you need extra protein. And unlike whey alternatives, MRE Protein Shake has a thicker, more milkshake-like texture that mixes easily and tastes better than anything on the market.  Plus, with no whey protein, the formula is incredibly gentle on your stomach, easy to digest, and does not result in bloating commonly associated with whey protein.

name: Redcon1 Knee Sleeve
description_html:
Constructed from the highest grade of neoprene, the Redcon1 knee sleeves deliver warmth, support and rebound and are comparable to a light knee wrap. The Redcon1 knee sleeve provides maximum support in keeping the knee stable and in the middle for your heaviest loads.

HOW TO PUT SLEEVES ON:

1. Slip the sleeve on over your ankle.

2. Grab the top of the sleeve and fold in sleeve in half so the logo is facing inward.

3. Grab and pull from the bottom of the sleeve and slide the sleeve up your leg until the sleeve (still folded in half) is more then covering the knee.

4. Grab the top half of the sleeve that is folded over and pull it to the top covering the top portion of the knee and lower thigh.

CARE: Hand Wash with mild soap and cold water. Air dry.

The Redcon1 Elbow Sleeve is made from high grade material that maintains elasticity throughout the most extreme abuse!

Excellent item to both proactively prevent injury, and to also treat injuries such as tendinitis, muscle and tendon strains and sprains, and stabilize atrophied or weak muscles.

Perfect level of compression to be supportive without interfering with your range of motion or restricting bicep or forearms.

Can be worn on forearms, elbows, biceps or knees for that extra level of support and safety.

name: TACTICAL PRO BACKPACK 25L BLACK W/ TEAL
description_html: The 25L Tactical Backpack is the perfect blend of durability and functionality, featuring dual adjustable cup holders for secure bottle storage, a padded protective pouch for laptops or tablets, and reinforced straps with ergonomic padding for all-day comfort and support. Designed for optimal organization, it offers four spacious compartments with interior dividers and secures your gear with industrial-grade zippers built to withstand the toughest conditions. Rugged yet versatile, this backpack is ideal for the gym, work, or everyday use.

name: TOTAL WAR Cranorange
description_html:
Cranorange Crush is here for the holiday season — a bright, mouthwatering fusion of juicy orange and bold, tangy cranberry that delivers the perfect balance of sweet citrus and sharp berry. This Limited Edition flavor is crisp, refreshing, and crafted to bring a festive twist to your training while still delivering the full-strength power of TOTAL WAR®.

With explosive energy, heightened focus, and performance-driven pump support, TOTAL WAR® takes this delicious seasonal flavor to the next level. Cranorange Crush is only available for a short time, and once it’s gone, it’s gone — grab a tub while you can and elevate your winter training with a flavor you won’t forget.

name: TOTAL WAR ENERGY SHOTS
description_html:
INTRODUCING THE TOTAL WAR ENERGY SHOT – THE ESSENTIAL SOLUTION FOR YOUR HIGH-PERFORMANCE ENERGY NEEDS. PACKED WITH A POTENT BLEND OF CAFFEINE AND ESSENTIAL B-VITAMINS, THIS ENERGY SHOT IS DESIGNED TO FUEL YOUR WORKOUTS AND POWER YOU THROUGH YOUR BUSIEST WORKDAYS.

PACKAGED IN A CONVENIENT 3OZ BOTTLE, EVERY SHOT FEATURES 300MG OF NATURAL CAFFEINE AND B-VITAMINS TO DELIVER ULTIMATE ENERGY AND HEIGHTENED FOCUS, KEEPING YOU SHARP AND ENERGIZED FOR THE LONG HAUL.

name: TOTAL WAR Leprechaun Limeade
description_html:
Strike gold with every sip. Leprechaun’s Limeade delivers a bright, electric limeade flavor bursting with crisp citrus and juicy fruit. Sharp, refreshing lime leads the way with a limeade twist to give a smooth, sweet, and refreshing sip.

Juicy kiwi adds a layer of tropical sweetness through the middle, while a subtle strawberry finish rounds everything out with soft berry juiciness. The result is a perfectly balanced limeade that stays crisp, vibrant, and incredibly refreshing from the first sip to the last.

name: TOTAL WAR Leprechaun Limeade Bundle
description_html: Level up your setup with the Leprechaun Limeade Bundle. Get the limited edition TOTAL WAR Preworkout Leprechaun Limeade paired with the 45L Tactical Backpack in Emerald. Perfect for the gym, travel, and everyday carry. Normally a $135 value, this bundle is available for just $99!

name: TOTAL WAR PREWORKOUT (15 Servings)
description_html: REDCON1 is a mission-based company founded on a simple principle - create the highest quality supplements for people who trained, for people that need to be at their best.

name: TOTAL WAR Preworkout
description_html:
Looking for the ultimate preworkout supplement to take your workouts to the next level? Experience REDCON1’s #1 selling preworkout formula! TOTAL WAR is an all-in-one preworkout powder that packs a powerful combination of endurance, pump, energy and focus factors. With 320mg caffeine, 3.2g beta alanine and 6g citrulline malate at the core of the formula, every scoop of TOTAL WAR is loaded with clinically researched ingredients at efficacious levels so you can train at an elite level, every time.

From the first scoop of our pre workout powder to the last, you’ll notice intense energy and laser focus on every set. Plus, you’ll feel increased strength, power, and pumps that will have you lifting heavier and for more reps. There is a reason we’ve never adjusted the formula – it’s that good. TOTAL WAR delivers every single time so you can train with “lights out” intensity and reach your HIGHEST STATE OF READINESS.

name: TOTAL WAR Ready To Drink Preworkout (12 Servings)
description_html:
TOTAL WAR RTD Preworkout drink is one of the most popular products on the market, providing a fully dosed, all-in-one blend of endurance, pump, energy, and focus factors in a ready-to-drink format. Its high demand is due to its effectiveness and convenience, making it a great option for anyone looking for a quick and powerful pre-workout boost.

With 365mg Caffeine, 3.2g Beta Alanine, 1g Taurine and 6g Citrulline Malate at the core of the formula, TOTAL WAR Ready-to-Drink delivers all of the same energy, focus, pump and performance benefits as the powder, but comes in a more convenient, on-the-go option and is available in over 10 delicious, refreshing flavors.

name: TOTAL WAR Reloaded
description_html: The TOTAL WAR lineup just expanded—TOTAL WAR RELOADED is a new fully loaded preworkout delivering incredible flavor, hard-hitting intensity, and 5g of creatine to support strength and performance. With a powerful blend of energy, endurance, and pump ingredients, it's built to fuel your most demanding training sessions.

name: TOTAL WAR Sour Mystery
description_html: Sour Mystery delivers a mouthwatering blast of sweet-and-sour goodness that makes preworkout taste like a treat. Bold, sour, and delicious—this is preworkout you’ll actually look forward to drinking. Inside every scoop you’ll still get the explosive energy, insane pumps, and relentless endurance TOTAL WAR™ is known for—but now with a flavor so good, it feels like a treat.

name: TOTAL WAR Toxic Twist
description_html:
Meet TOXIC TWIST — Sour First. Sweet Later.
This Halloween, we’re serving up a pre-workout that doesn’t just deliver results—it delivers flavor. TOXIC TWIST hits you with a bold, sour citrus punch that quickly flips into a smooth, sweet finish. It’s sharp, tangy, and refreshingly addictive—making every scoop something you’ll crave before every lift.

Behind the mouthwatering taste is the powerful TOTAL WAR® formula you know and trust. Each scoop fuels your training with 320 mg of caffeine for unstoppable energy, 3.2 g of beta-alanine for relentless endurance, and 6 g of citrulline for pumps.
